hero.title: Pricing &
hero.subtitle: Transparent packages for our social experiences, and tailored custom quotes for full private events.

packages.title: Social Experiences
packages.description: Perfect for date nights, girls' nights out, or small celebrations without renting the full venue.

packages.title: Private Events
packages.description: Full venue buyouts, bespoke design, and tailored catering for up to 50 guests.
features: Private use of the entire space

faq.question: Do you require a deposit?
faq.answer: Yes, a 50% non-refundable retainer is required to secure your date for private events. The remaining balance is due 14 days prior to your event.

faq.question: Can we bring our own catering or alcohol?
faq.answer: Part of the KKD Avenue experience is our exceptional in-house catering and bar service. Outside food and beverages are generally not permitted, but we can accommodate special dietary restrictions and custom menu requests.

faq.question: What is the capacity of the venue?
faq.answer: Our space is designed for intimate to mid-sized elevated gatherings. We comfortably accommodate up to 50 guests for a seated dinner and 75 for cocktail-style events.
